bestiary_lore.1: The most ordinary swamp frog — the one everything starts with. Sits, blinks, catches flies, and worries about nothing. No superpowers, just pure froggy essence. But it is from such unassuming Froggies that legends grow. Every great toad was once just a Froggy on a lily pad.
bestiary_lore.2: A Froggy that has grown up a bit and gained spots on its back. No longer a tadpole, but not yet an authority either. Sits with more importance, looks more confident, croaks deeper. The spots are the first sign that the toad is maturing and gaining swamp experience. Frog knows all the best snags and the juiciest mosquitoes around.
bestiary_lore.3: A toad with a pink lotus sprouted from its head — a sign of harmony with the swamp. The calmer Lotuscroak is, the more lushly its crown blooms. Meditates on a lily pad, breathes the mist, and rarely croaks in vain. They say even mosquitoes buzz quieter near it. The embodiment of swamp zen and quiet power.
bestiary_lore.4: A strange hybrid of toad and snail: a real spiral shell coiled on its back. Carries its home with it, so it is never in a hurry — no need to rush when comfort is always at hand. Hides in the shell when danger comes. Slow, but unbreakable: try prying one out of its shelter.
bestiary_lore.5: A toad with bright red fly agarics grown on its back and head. The more mushrooms, the more toxic the temper. Toadshroom is slightly out of it from mushroom spores, sees things that are not there, and giggles for no reason. Do not touch: it is poisonous itself, and its mushrooms are best not eaten. The swamp's lunatic — but a kind lunatic.
bestiary_lore.6: A mysterious cat-frog hybrid: fluffy ears, long tail, but still croaks and loves water. Purrs and croaks at the same time, driving the whole swamp mad. Independent, cunning, and lazy — a typical cat, only amphibious. Catches both flies and mice. No one knows how this ever happened.
bestiary_lore.7: A toad that climbed out of the swamp into the forest, where branched orange antlers grew on its head, like a deer's. Wears them proudly, snout in the air, and considers itself nobler than its swamp kin. The antlers are not for fighting, but for show: with them Hornleap snags autumn leaves and struts among the trees. Leaps high so everyone sees its crown.
bestiary_lore.8: An athlete among toads: long muscular legs, lean body, always in a half-crouch before a jump. Hopper races through the forest, flying from stump to stump and branch to branch in a single leap. Long-jump champion among all amphibians. Catching it among the trees is impossible — landing one, even more so.
bestiary_lore.9: A sturdy toad whose back is covered with hard bumps and knobs, like old bark. Bumpler is the forest's tank: thick-skinned, slow, but nearly invulnerable. Both woodpecker beaks and fox teeth break against its growths. Sits under a tree like a boulder — you cannot tell at first if it is a toad or a mossy stump.
bestiary_lore.10: An incredibly fat, round bubble-toad consisting mostly of belly. Bellybloat eats everything that crawls and flies through the forest, and has swelled to the size of a ball. Moves with difficulty, rolling between roots, but absolutely happy. Its philosophy is simple: ate, slept, ate again. The most contented toad in the forest.
bestiary_lore.11: A toad that has turned into a small spiky dinosaur: a crest of sharp spines runs along its back. Spinecroak is no longer cute — it bares its teeth, hisses, and grunts menacingly through the forest. The first step toward becoming a true monster. The spines are still small, but they grow, and the temper sours along with them. Best not to tease.
bestiary_lore.12: A terrifying spiked monster, covered in quills, with three eyes and a wide toothy maw. Quillmaw is what Spinecroak turns into after overeating spite. Huge, lumpy, bristling on all sides. Devours anything that moves in the thicket and spares no one. The forest gives its lair a wide berth.
bestiary_lore.13: A mutant that crawled from the forest onto the boundless continent: three unblinking eyes and a thin lantern-antenna on its head. Trieye shines this little light in the darkness, luring prey like a deep-sea anglerfish. Sees in all directions at once — you cannot hide from it. Cold, silent, as if from another world.
bestiary_lore.14: A toad inhabited by the continent's corruption. Heavy and slow in appearance, but a cold malevolence emanates from it, and all living things avoid its shadow. With each rebirth Foulcroak grows darker and swells with dark power, and by its final form grows monstrous claws capable of crushing stone. A demon that hides its claws until the time is right.
bestiary_lore.15: The continent's elder demon — what Foulcroak becomes when filled with darkness. Blood-red crest, twisted horns, an evil grin. Hellcroak crawled out of the deepest depths, where the earth boils and smells of sulfur. Its eyes burn, its croak sounds like a roar. Even Beeba and Boba fall silent before it. The crown of the dark side of toads.
bestiary_lore.16: A massive jock-toad with a dumb face and a heavy stare from under his brow. Beeba sits squatting in the middle of the continent, cracking sunflower seeds and eyeing everyone who passes by. He barely knows any words — but has a heavy paw. The terror of these parts. Where Beeba goes — Boba follows; they are always on the block together.
bestiary_lore.17: Beeba's pal and his right paw — the same hulking bruiser with an eternally dissatisfied mug. Boba does not keep his words to himself, prefers to croak straight into your face. Sits next to Beeba, spits through his teeth, and guards their patch of land. Two peas in a pod: where Beeba stirs trouble — Boba sorts it out.
bestiary_lore.18: The king of all toads, crowned with a golden crown — the final and greatest form. King Croak is enormous, wise, and formidable; his croak rings across the entire continent like a decree. Under his rule are the jocks, the monsters, and the sages alike. Whoever walked the path from tiny Froggy to King Croak has conquered the entire world.

settings.calm_farm_desc: Disables aura and particles around frogs

crew.explanation: Crew runs up to {{cap}} missions per day. Reset at local midnight.

flight_confirm.title: Fly to {{name}}?
flight_confirm.in_transit: You will redirect course from {{from}} to {{to}}

cosmic_hub.title: Cosmic Hub

boxes.empty_placeholder: No boxes yet. Earn one via scout mission.

cosmic_hub.serums_empty: Serums will appear after opening boxes

bestiary.locked_tooltip: Not yet discovered. Stabilize carriers to populate.
bestiary.empty_state: Nothing yet. Stabilize carriers — bits will appear here.
bestiary.lore_placeholder: {{element}} carrier at level {{level}}. Stable form; full lore coming soon.
bestiary.locked_hint: Unlocks on first stabilization of this combination.
bestiary.milestone_576: Reward: exclusive frog visual for 576 cells

quests.empty_state: No active quests. Open Contacts to accept.
quests.cap_reached: Active quest limit: {{cap}}. Complete current ones.
quests.cancel_confirm: Abandon quest? Relationship with «{{race}}» will drop by 1.

cosmic_shop.skip_requires_transit: Ship is not in transit — nothing to skip.

cosmic_box.title: Cosmic box
cosmic_box.desc: Guaranteed 3 L7+ frogs at the current location.

slot_plus_one.title: +1 slot
slot_plus_one.desc: Permanently increases the field slot cap.

ship_speed.title: +5% ship speed
ship_speed.desc: Reduces travel time by 5% per level.

serum_drop_chance.title: +0.5% serum drop chance
serum_drop_chance.desc: Increases base serum drop chance from boxes.

skip_ship_cooldown.title: Skip ship cooldown
skip_ship_cooldown.desc: Instantly completes the current ship transit.

serum_trade_up.title: Serum trade-up
serum_trade_up.desc: 3 serums of one element → 1 serum of a random element.

crystalloids.name: Crystalloids
crystalloids.lore_short: Silicon-based life. Their bodies are growing crystal druses. Cold, wise, slow — a millennium is a heartbeat for them.
crystalloids.communication_style: Geometric patterns, dry precise words. Consider speech an excess.

0.text: Silicassos greets you. We grew in this pattern for two eras.

1.text: The crystal speaks slowly. Listen to the shape, not the sound.

2.text: Tune our frequency to one of your L18 frogs. One pulse — and we remember.

3.text: We know your ancestor. He sang in our choir long ago.

4.text: Accept this gift: a facet from our mine. Refuse — we will understand.

5.text: Find our scout who went silent in the Binary system.

7.text: Agree to symmetry. Otherwise we turn an edge to you.

8.text: Deliver a resonant shard to Texum; we have a dispute with the Liquidspheres.

9.text: We have recorded your reply. The crystal does not forget.

10.text: Stand inside our lattice for one beat. We will read your answer more cleanly.

11.text: Agree to hold silence about our mines. Sound is excess there.

12.text: Take an imprint of the far facet in the Paradox system. We need the exact angle.

14.text: The facet is added to our pattern. You are now part of the drawing.

15.text: Align your rhythm with our lattice for one more beat. We will crystallize the difference.

16.text: Measure the angle between two of our remote facets in the Rootworld system. Precision is your trait.

18.text: Accept our slowness as a form of speech. It is longer than your life.

19.text: The pattern has inscribed you deeper. Do not hurry to leave.

gasouls.name: Gas Clouds
gasouls.lore_short: A gaseous form of life, made entirely of dense breath. Shapeless, they sing in resonances the size of small planets.
gasouls.communication_style: Poetic, metaphorical. Messages are short songs.

0.text: We sing with Soundfloat. Do you hear our silence?

1.text: Our people are a resonance between worlds.

2.text: Give us one beat of silence. One pulse.

3.text: The song is older than words. Listen.

4.text: Accept our song into your ship's log.

5.text: Find the lost note in the asteroid cloud.

6.description: our chord has gone out of tune

8.text: Save our choir — find the sunken resonator on the colony.

9.text: We sing of you. Softer or louder — depends on you.

10.text: Hum a single low overtone with us. Only one — and you enter the song.

11.text: Agree to carry our song to Scorch. The Fireworms should hear it.

12.text: Catch the echo of our ancestor near the asteroid belt. It went out unanswered.

14.text: The song holds your note. Where it travels — you choose.

15.text: Take our long breath into your chest. One — and we will sing in unison.

16.text: Walk the line of resonance from Soundfloat to Lightning-Catch. Mark where the song dies.

18.text: Agree to hear our silence. It is longer than any word.

19.text: The note holds. You are its continuation.

mechanidons.name: Mechanidons
mechanidons.lore_short: A bio-and-machine hybrid. Self-upgrading cyborg beings for whom technology is religion.

1.text: Our evolution is an upgrade. Biology is a deprecated protocol.

2.text: Transmit the spec of your L18 asset. Utilitarian.

7.text: Agree to the standard contract. Otherwise resource overhead.

8.text: Run diagnostics in the Scorch system. Anomaly logged.

9.text: Record saved. Next iteration — your move.

11.text: Agree to ship telemetry. Anonymous, aggregated.

12.text: Audit the Liquidsphere supply chain. Variance on balance — 4.6%.

14.text: Contract extended. Next revision next cycle.

15.text: Confirm the extended SLA. Reaction time — 0.8 cycle, penalty — 7%.

16.text: Run a stress test on the node in the Paradox system. Expect phase deviation.

18.text: Agree to backup of your log. Mirror channel, AE-9 encryption.

19.text: Contract extended indefinitely. Next revision is event-driven.

fireworms.name: Fireworms
fireworms.lore_short: Plasma bodies that live inside stars and burning cores. Warlike, aggressive, straightforward — duels are their culture.

0.text: I am Fireworm. Scorch burns. Speak quickly.

1.text: We were born in a star. Cold is an insult.

2.text: Give us fuel. We know you have it.

3.text: The weak do not trade with us. Only warriors.

4.text: Accept our challenge — send an L18 on patrol. Otherwise you are a coward.

5.text: Find our runaway acolyte in the Scorch system. Return him or burn him.

7.text: Agree to the duel. Refuse — we remember.

8.text: Deliver a fire shard to Unseen. The Tenebrians need one. Or we need a pretext.

10.text: Swear an oath in flame. Words are ash. An oath is a scar.

11.text: Agree to wear our mark. Cometfolk will see — and turn away.

12.text: Catch the traitor near the Scorch corona. Alive. Rare request.

14.text: Scar on the armor. We remember. We burn on.

15.text: Temper our blade on your flame. A dull blade returned is a shame.

16.text: Find and burn the traitor's lair in the Scorch system. No prisoners.

18.text: Agree to wear our scar openly. Hide it — and the pain returns.

19.text: The flame nods. We march on.

liquidoids.name: Liquidspheres
liquidoids.lore_short: Amoeba-like liquid life. They take any shape, can split and merge. Traders, curious travellers.
liquidoids.communication_style: Friendly, love to barter. Every message is a deal proposal.

0.text: Texum greets you. We have a proposal.

1.text: We can take any shape. Convenient for bargaining.

2.text: Trade one serum — gain our friendship.

3.text: Our economy is flow. Are you part of the flow?

4.text: Accept our offer of a colony on a border planet.

5.text: Escort our caravan through a contested sector.

6.description: a contract collapsed, liquidity drained away

7.text: Sign the trade protocol. Standard terms.

8.text: Find the stolen cargo. The stake is your reputation.

10.text: Cede a percentage of your sector. In return — doors on three markets.

11.text: Agree to a truce with the Fireworms brokered by our table. Warm profit.

12.text: Bring two feuding factions to the table. Fee per deal.

14.text: The flow continues. You are a node, not a clog.

15.text: Sign the new protocol. Double margin on your side — we drink the spread.

16.text: Escort our rare cargo through the Paradox sector. Bonus — a share of the shipment.

18.text: Agree to be a broker on three markets. 3% commission, guaranteed payout.

19.text: The flow has widened. You are the main channel.

tenebrians.name: Tenebrians
tenebrians.lore_short: Shadowy anti-matter life. They exist between dimensions. Mystics, quiet observers — they see the soul behind the form.

0.text: Unseen sees. You arrive from the light. That is curious.

1.text: We are between dimensions. Here and not here.

2.text: Show us the shadow of your star. One glance — and we will know.

3.text: The soul has a shape. Yours is a spiral.

4.text: Accept our prophecy. Refuse — it will come true differently.

5.text: Find the hidden gate in the Soundfloat system. It is veiled from others.

6.description: the shadow ritual was broken by foreign light

7.text: Agree to be an observer. Do not interfere.

8.text: Protect the last shard of night. Otherwise we vanish.

10.text: Turn from your sun for one cycle. Then we will show more.

11.text: Agree to hold a name we whisper to you. Do not say it aloud.

12.text: Walk the edge of the veil in the Paradox system. Something there answers us.

14.text: Shadow takes the shape of your reply. Do not look back.

15.text: Stay silent about what you see in our reflection. Its name is not for speech.

16.text: Find the one who whispers your shadow on Unseen. Bring back her word, not her.

18.text: Agree to watch without interfering. The line is thin as a blade.

19.text: Shadow knows your step. Do not look back.

plasmaspirits.name: Plasma Spirits
plasmaspirits.lore_short: Plasma beings — electric, with uncontrollable energy. They love speed and novelty, nomads by nature.
plasmaspirits.communication_style: Short impulsive messages, often emotional and shifting.

1.text: We do not sit still. We are a flow of electrons.

2.text: Let us boost your ship! One charge!

3.text: Old age, for us, is a halt.

4.text: Back our migration. Otherwise we flare without you.

5.text: Catch up to our scout near Texum. They fell behind.

6.description: a flare scattered our flock off course

7.text: Agree to the boost. Hesitation is weakness.

8.text: Reconnect with the lost flock. They are drifting.

10.text: Race! Right now! Accept — we launch. No — we are already ahead.

11.text: Let us discharge your shield for five hits. Fun! Come on!

12.text: Break through the storm in the Scorch system. We lost a spark in there.

14.text: Electron! You are faster than you looked. Onward.

15.text: Catch the spark! Right now — we tossed a charge your way!

16.text: Chase our scout near Texum — they raced off without a map again! Find them!

18.text: Agree to the boost! Drift is death, speed is life!

19.text: Lightning! You are in the flock. Keep up.

forestcores.name: Forestroots
forestcores.lore_short: Fungal-root life. Vast underground networks cover whole planets. Ancient and calm, wisdom through silence.
forestcores.communication_style: Rare but deep messages. Metaphors of forest, of life cycles.

0.text: The roots of Rootworld greet you. We grew for a long time.

1.text: Our mycelium remembers every stone of its planet.

2.text: Share with us a seed of your world. One pulse.

3.text: Time is growth. The root does not hurry.

4.text: Accept our sprout into your garden. Tend to it.

5.text: Save our young forest from orbital sterility.

6.description: an old pact with the soil has not held

7.text: Agree to take root. Or we will turn away.

8.text: Help relocate a spore to a new colony.

10.text: Grant us one year of silence over your border planet. A year is a single breath for us.

11.text: Agree not to fell our ancestor-tree. Even while it sleeps.

12.text: Tie the mycelium of two of our forests through a neutral sector. A thin thread.

14.text: A root reaches toward your sector. Not fast, but already begun.

15.text: Stand above our sleeping root for one season. It is shorter than it seems.

16.text: Carry our spore to the Wanderling system. Let it grow where no one expected.

18.text: Agree not to fell even our dead tree. It is still thinking.

19.text: The root reaches on. You are a direction, not a destination.

timeweavers.name: Timeweavers
timeweavers.lore_short: They exist in a non-temporal dimension, seeing past and future at once. Esoterics and philosophers — they help or warn, never command.

0.text: The spirals greet you. We knew of you before your birth.

1.text: Time, for us, is fabric. We weave it.

2.text: Show us one of your choices. We will unfold it.

3.text: Past and future are one point. Now is the illusion.

4.text: Accept the thread of fate. Refuse — the pattern shifts.

5.text: Find a knot in the time stream near the Unseen system.

6.description: a weaving ritual tore the thread of time

7.text: Agree to be a thread. Not a loop.

8.text: Join two points in the spiral. A carrier is needed.

9.text: The pattern is closing. You are a stitch.

10.text: Refuse tomorrow's chance. It interferes with yesterday's answer.

11.text: Agree to forget one of your choices. No matter — we remember it.

12.text: Unravel the loop forming at your outpost. It will not release you.

14.text: The stitch lies. The fabric is longer than you think.

15.text: Agree to remember a day that will not come. It matters more than the one that did.

16.text: Find a knot in the Silicassos system where the loop closes twice. Untie one.

18.text: Agree not to ask the question. The answer was already given — just not for you.

19.text: The stitch lies even. The fabric remembers your hand.

cometfolk.name: Cometfolk
cometfolk.lore_short: Comet-cloud travellers without a permanent form. Open, friendly, curious — they return once per season.
cometfolk.communication_style: Enthusiastic, sharing stories from distant voyages.

0.text: Greetings from the comet's crest! We are glad to meet you.

1.text: We wander between stars. Every meeting is a feast.

2.text: Share with us a sliver of ice from the core. Just for friendship.

3.text: Our home is motion. The route is family.

4.text: Accept our invitation to a flight around the binary.

5.text: Escort our young comet through the asteroid field.

6.description: our envoy is lost beyond the asteroid belt

7.text: Agree to the flight. It is dull to refuse friends.

8.text: Find our lost crest in the Texum system.

9.text: Fly with us. The stars are near.

10.text: Tell us a story of one of your stars. We will tell three in return.

11.text: Agree to give our youngster a ride for one season. They do not chatter.

12.text: Take a long orbit with us — past the belt, to Silicassos and back. One swing, two years.

14.text: The route already marks you. Until the next crest!

15.text: Share one story about your frog with us! We will share three about the stars!

16.text: Fly with our young comet to the Paradox belt — it has never been there!

18.text: Agree to travel without a map for one season. The stars will show — we are near.

19.text: The crest is ready. Until the next meeting in the sky!

event.solar_flare: a solar flare damaged orbital stations
event.failed_pact: a pact with an old ally has failed

first_box.title: 🎰 Slot machine started!
first_box.body: Spin duration hints rarity. Tap anywhere after the first second to skip.

first_serum.title: 🧪 Applying serum
first_serum.body: Tap a serum to select, then tap an eligible frog. Common — swamp, rare — forest, epic — continent, legendary — planet.

first_feed.title: 🍽️ Feeding and ceiling
first_feed.body: Each carrier has a hidden ceiling. First feeds — «???». After 3-4 — color hint. After 5 — exact number.

first_stabilize.title: ✨ Stabilization
first_stabilize.body: Carrier stabilized! To go above the ceiling, merge two same-element same-level carriers — guaranteed S-roll for next level.

bonus.mini_hint: Reach L18 to unlock the full bonus (×10)

welcome.title: Frog Evolution
welcome.subtitle: Tap frogs. Merge same. Discover the world.

location.unlocked: {{name}} unlocked! Tap the icon to visit

birth.title: You Created the Captain
birth.subtitle: The cosmos is open. Ready to explore?

cometfolk_long_orbit_b.description: Yoo-hoo! The long orbit sweeps past 15 planets — let's fly together and wave at every one!

cometfolk_long_orbit_c.description: The longest orbit of the century! 50 planets — a dance through the galaxy's arm. Ready?

cometfolk_lost_crest.description: Hey, we lost the family crest across three missions in a row! Complete 3 missions and find it, please!

cometfolk_young_comet.description: A young comet is just learning to fly! Visit 5 planets and show it the route — it'll be fun!

crystalloids_lattice_survey_b.description: The Crystalloids invite you to alignment meditation. Raise relations to tier 6 — and the lattice will open further.

crystalloids_lattice_survey_c.description: The deep lattice resonates only with an L17 frog. Patiently merge to that level — the crystal will hear.

crystalloids_shard_delivery.description: The lattice needs 5 crystal serums for a new resonator. Bring them — the pattern will keep growing.

crystalloids_silent_scout.description: The ancient crystals lend you their notice. Visit 5 planets — each observation strengthens the lattice.

fireworms_blood_oath_b.description: The blood oath demands sacrifice. Perform 50 merges — let the flame witness your resolve.

fireworms_blood_oath_c.description: The oath's final rite! Reach an L17 frog — only in this flame is a true warrior born.

fireworms_runaway_acolyte.description: A runaway acolyte hides among the stars! Search 5 planets — he will not escape the flame.

fireworms_shard_to_tenebrians.description: The Tenebrians must receive the flame's tribute. Deliver 5 fire serums — let them know who owns the stars.

forestcores_root_bridge_b.description: The root bridge grows slowly... bring a frog to level 13 — the soil will remember its step.

forestcores_root_bridge_c.description: The deep roots ask for trust. Raise relations to tier 8 — the forest will open its hidden paths.

forestcores_spore_migration.description: The spores ready for migration. Bring 5 forest serums — each drop will unfold new soil.

forestcores_young_forest.description: The young forest asks for merging... combine 10 times — let the canopies touch unhurriedly.

gasouls_lost_note.description: Hear us... one note is lost on the wind. Bring 5 gas serums — the melody will return.

gasouls_silent_chorus_b.description: The silent chorus calls you closer... raise relations to tier 6 — and our voices will sound for you.

gasouls_silent_chorus_c.description: The chorus's full union needs 200 mergings... perform 200 merges — each joins two souls into one.

gasouls_sunken_resonator.description: The resonator sank into mission mist... complete 3 missions — the wind's whisper will return to its strings.

liquidoids_caravan.description: The caravan awaits cargo. 5 water serums at the agreed price — deliver and the deal is closed.

liquidoids_market_truce_b.description: The market truce requires trust. Raise relations to tier 6 — the trade will benefit everyone.

liquidoids_market_truce_c.description: The grand deal is only possible with full trust. Raise relations to tier 8 — and the market is yours.

liquidoids_stolen_cargo.description: The caravan was robbed — 50M gold went missing. Accumulate 50M and cover the loss per contract.

mechanidons_audit_route_b.description: Route audit protocol requires trust tier 6. Confirm status — the module will activate automatically.

mechanidons_audit_route_c.description: Final protocol check: an L17 frog is required for certification. Reach the level — the report will close.

mechanidons_diagnostics.description: Diagnostics require 3 completed missions for calibration. Complete the cycle — the report will form automatically.

mechanidons_module_delivery.description: The maintenance module requires 5 mechanical serums. Deliver per spec — work order closed.

plasmaspirits_lost_flock.description: The flock scattered across 5 planets — lightning won't wait! Fly through them all before the storm dies!

plasmaspirits_outrun.description: Run! Outrun the storm across 3 missions in a row — whoever lags becomes part of the lightning!

plasmaspirits_storm_race_b.description: Storm race! 50 merges at lightning tempo — every discharge speeds up the next!

plasmaspirits_storm_race_c.description: The grand storm of the century! 30 missions without rest — whoever holds out becomes the flock's leader!

tenebrians_hidden_gate.description: Quiet... no one must know. Visit 5 planets and find the hidden gate — we'll whisper the direction.

tenebrians_last_shard.description: The last shadow shard must be returned in secret. Bring 5 shadow serums — tell no one where they came from.

tenebrians_veil_walk_b.description: Walking under the veil requires silence. Visit 15 planets leaving no trace — the shadow will value your craft.

tenebrians_veil_walk_c.description: The deep veil hides 50 planets. Walk them all in silence — the Tenebrians will accept you as one of their own.

timeweavers_spiral_link.description: The spiral of time asks for its first link... bring a frog to L8 — the knot will tighten on the thread of the past.

timeweavers_temporal_knot.description: The temporal knot needs 10 mergings — each ties an instant to eternity.

timeweavers_unspun_thread_b.description: The unspun thread awaits its spinner. Bring a frog to L13 — the future will unfurl its pattern.

timeweavers_unspun_thread_c.description: To read the thread whole, you must become part of it. Raise relations to tier 8 — time will let you into its circle.
